vulnerabilities.description: Lack of security middleware such as Helmet and CORS with a whitelist.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet and configure CORS to restrict requests to trusted origins.

vulnerabilities.description: No rate-limiting middleware is configured to prevent abuse.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add a rate-limiting middleware using defined `RATE_LIMIT_MAX` and `RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW` from the environment variables.

vulnerabilities.description: Absence of JWT/OAuth2 configuration and absence of permission checks (RBAC/ABAC).
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement JWT-based authentication and add RBAC/ABAC middleware to check permissions for secured endpoints.

vulnerabilities.description: Potential for secret leakage in logs if they are not properly configured.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure that secret information such as JWT secrets and environment variables are not included in logs.
